node.text: Dave didn't get a chance to hang out with Aerosmith after the show but was content with seeing them live.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Aerosmith live performance") on Session 2 (Score: 0.96)

node.text: Dave's favorite band from the music festival was Aerosmith, and he found their performance incredible.
